overall.description: First-person exploration of a futuristic high-rise interior from Cyberpunk 2077, walking from a plant-filled corridor with city views toward a security checkpoint with red laser barriers and a reception desk.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury corridor with vertical gardens and city views

events.description: natural light from window fades as corridor turns toward interior security area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the corridor, passing white storage cabinets and metal shutter doors while observing the vertical garden walls

entered.detail: tall living plant wall with large green leaves in white rectangular planters
floor-to-ceiling window revealing hazy cityscape with distant buildings
modern white storage unit with multiple drawers
dark metal roll-up shutter door between the plant walls

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a modern, upscale corridor featuring prominent vertical garden walls on the right and large windows offering views of a hazy cityscape. The camera passes white storage cabinets and metal shutter doors as it moves forward, with lighting gradually shifting from mixed natural light to darker interior tones.

scene_state.functional_zone: security checkpoint with red laser barriers

events.description: enters security checkpoint area dominated by red horizontal laser barriers
passes through the red security barrier, entering the reception area with warm wall sconces

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing through the red security barrier, moving toward the reception desk at the end of the corridor

entered.detail: wall with horizontal glowing red laser stripes and SECURITY text
wall signage with SECURITY text in red neon
long reception counter with plants and items on top, illuminated by warm lighting
rectangular wall-mounted light fixture emitting warm white light
small potted plant on the reception desk

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a security checkpoint characterized by prominent red horizontal laser barriers and neon SECURITY signage. The environment shifts to a darker, red-lit atmosphere as the camera passes through the barrier and approaches a reception desk illuminated by warm wall sconces, marking the transition from the garden corridor to a secure interior zone.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a bright, plant-filled corridor into a dark, high-security interior zone. It begins by gliding past lush vertical garden walls and large windows overlooking a hazy cityscape, passing white storage cabinets and metal shutter doors. As the camera moves forward, the natural light fades, and the environment shifts toward darker interior tones. The scene then opens into a security checkpoint where the atmosphere turns a deep red, marked by neon signage and horizontal laser barriers. Finally, the camera passes through the laser grid and approaches a reception desk illuminated by warm wall sconces.
